description: Setup environment - install dependencies and verify baseline build passes
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/Porto-Fakhul to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling works
Run `npm run lint` to check linting passes
acceptance_criteria: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0 or only has pre-existing warnings
findings: npm install: 265 packages, 0 vulnerabilities. Build: tsc + vite build succeed (exit 0). Lint: 11 pre-existing errors on main (react-hooks/set-state-in-effect, @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any, react-refresh/only-export-components) - none introduced by this task. Chunk size warning for vendor-three (945kB) is informational only.
